scripts.dev: bun run build:client && flue dev --target cloudflare
scripts.build: bun run build:worker && bun run build:client
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run astro:check
scripts.deploy:preview: bun run build && bun run preview:upload --
scripts.migrate:production: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy: bun run build && bun run migrate:production && bun run sync:secrets && wrangler deploy --config dist/enchiridion/wrangler.json
scripts.dry-run: bun run build && wrangler deploy --dry-run --config dist/enchiridion/wrangler.json
